description: Config and state migration from tmux to Zellij format (migrate.py:1)

key_interfaces.name: migrate_config_if_needed
key_interfaces.description: Detect old config format ([tmux] section), backup, and migrate to new Zellij format. Returns True if migrated.

key_interfaces.name: migrate_state_if_needed
key_interfaces.description: Migrate state.json: window_name -> tab_name, remove legacy pane_id. Returns True if migrated.

user_flows.name: migrate project config
steps: build new config: server, default_runner, channels, username, env_file, mcp_server_cmd

user_flows.name: migrate state.json
steps: rename window_name -> tab_name in agent entries
rename weechat_window -> weechat_tab in IRC state
